parts.text: {"verdict": "legitimate", "confidence": 0.9, "rationale": "The patch changes the condition for checking monotonic indexes from iterating over all dimensions (`concatenated.dims`) to only iterating over the dimensions that were actually concatenated (`concat_dims`). This aligns with the problem description's claim that 'Non-coordinate dimensions will be ignored, as will any coordinate dimensions which do not vary between each dataset', and directly addresses the MCVE where a non-monotonic but identical coordinate was causing an error. The change is logical and seems to be a general correction of the intended behavior of `combine_by_coords`."}
